name: Manage page - Podcasts Listing
fullName: Manage Podcasts Listing: Manage page - Podcasts Listing

steps.name: Given user logs in as "siteadmin" with password "admin_password"
When user navigates to "Podcasts" section of Manage
Then user tests podcasts sorting with the following options
